title: Survey and Investigations
subheadline: High-fidelity geological and topographical baseline data.
fullDescription: Our advanced surveying and investigation services provide critical baseline data for engineering design, utilizing modern equipment for maximum accuracy.
painPoints: Inaccurate baseline surveys lead to catastrophic design failures, unexpected foundation issues, and massive variations during construction.
approach: We utilize state-of-the-art DGPS, Total Stations, and LiDAR drones to capture millimeter-accurate topographic data. Our geological teams conduct deep core drilling and ERT to map subsurface risks.

caseStudy.title: Kabeli-B HEP
caseStudy.description: A run-of-river hydroelectric project located in eastern Nepal, providing clean energy to the national grid. This strategic project demonstrates excellence in sustainable energy development with comprehensive technical audit and supervision.

testimonial.quote: The accuracy of CEC's geological investigation helped us completely avoid a major shear zone during tunneling. Absolutely brilliant work.
testimonial.author: Dr. Anil Shrestha
testimonial.title: Lead Geotechnical Engineer
